alternatives_considered: Keep private until more features land
Use GitHub organization instead of personal account
content.context: Repo cleanup was complete (legacy artifacts removed, KB migrated to .leo/, CI green, README rewritten with pitch-style intro, first release published). Owner decided it was ready for public visitors.
content.decision: Changed leo-core repo visibility from private to public on 2026-04-13. Enabled delete-branch-on-merge. Updated repo description to use L.E.O. branding.
impact: Anyone can view, fork, and open PRs
Branch protection rules now available on free plan
Merge access remains restricted to owner and collaborators
